info.name: fairregister
info.summary: Register files as Works in fairregister directly from Nextcloud.
info.description:
Register files stored in Nextcloud as Works in a fairregister (faircommons) instance to prove ownership at a specific point in time.
How it works:
- A new "Register with fairregister" action appears in the three-dots menu of every file in the Files app. - One click streams the file from Nextcloud into the configured fairregister storage and opens the fairregister registration form in a new tab, pre-filled with the file reference. - The user fills in metadata (title, type, license, contributors, …) in the fairregister frontend, which is the source of truth for the resulting Work record. - The Nextcloud sidebar offers a deep link to the user's "My works" page in fairregister for browsing and certificate download.
Authentication is OpenID Connect (Keycloak) — each user connects once in Personal Settings. The app uses an authorization-code flow with PKCE and stores tokens encrypted via Nextcloud's ICrypto.
Admin: configure the fairregister API base URL, the fairregister frontend URL, and the OIDC issuer / client id in Administration Settings.
info.author: fairkom
